{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Throne of Karosha
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Throne of Karosha]] is a political entity or seat of power.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“You don’t work for the Throne of Karosha as a spy, do you?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
